paper_focus.title: Formation of precipitates and their effects on the mechanical properties in a Fe–Mn–Al–C austenitic low-density steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To address the trade-off between yield strength and work-hardening capacity caused by uniformly distributed κ-carbides by introducing strong carbide-forming elements Ti and V to achieve heterogeneous κ-carbide precipitation.
